seoTitle: Create a Knowledge Base in Confluence (2026 Guide)
metaDescription: Learn how to create a knowledge base in Confluence in 2026 using the dedicated space template, labels, and permissions to build a self-service hub.
intro: When procedures live only in scattered chat threads, onboarding and support both slow down. This guide shows how to set up a structured knowledge base space in Confluence in 2026, complete with categorized articles and access controls.

steps.heading: Open the Spaces menu
steps.body: From your dashboard, go to the top navigation bar and click Spaces.

steps.heading: Pick the Knowledge Base template
steps.body: Select Create Space and choose the dedicated Knowledge Base template.

steps.heading: Name your hub
steps.body: Type a search-optimized name for your documentation hub and configure its space key.

steps.heading: Generate the homepage
steps.body: Click Create to instantly generate a pre-structured homepage with an integrated live search bar.

steps.heading: Add your first article
steps.body: Click Create Page, then use slash commands to build out a how-to guide layout.

steps.heading: Label and publish
steps.body: Use the right-hand panel to add classification labels for faster discovery, then click Publish.

faq.question: Do I need a special template to build a knowledge base in Confluence?
faq.answer: Using the dedicated Knowledge Base space type gives you a pre-structured homepage with search built in, which saves time versus a blank space.

faq.question: How do I make articles easier for readers to find?
faq.answer: Applying consistent classification labels and index markers to each article makes the content more scannable and searchable.

faq.question: Can I control who edits versus who just reads the knowledge base?
faq.answer: Yes, space permissions let you balance public visibility against restricted access for draft content.

faq.question: Can I see which articles my team actually uses?
faq.answer: Yes, built-in analytics panels let you check which documentation guides get the most traffic.
